one_line_positioning: Marketing leader with no coding or AI engineering experience — not a fit for this technical role
narrative_angle: While the candidate brings deep understanding of consumer brand strategy and customer journeys, the role demands hands-on AI engineering skills (LLMs, Python, front-end) that are absent from their background.
tone_guidance: Be transparent: do not attempt to disguise lack of technical qualifications. If applying, clearly state how marketing insight could complement AI implementation, but fully acknowledge that no hands-on engineering is possible.
recruiter_first_impression_target: Immediately sees candidate lacks required technical skills; no further reading needed.
reasoning: The candidate's background is entirely in marketing and brand strategy, with no coding or AI development experience. All must-have requirements are unmet. The role demands an AI Product Engineer capable of building with LLMs, Python, SQL, and front-ends. No amount of transferable marketing knowledge can compensate for this fundamental skill gap. Therefore, SKIP.
